title: azalea javanica
intro: Azalea javanica, also known as the Javanese azalea or Pentanisia prittwitzii, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to Java and other parts of Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Azalea javanica include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The herbal preparations of Azalea javanica include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
